generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance CraneController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Embedded controller managing crane movements, positioning, and operational logic."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance GreenhouseEnvironmentalSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor component within the greenhouse environment for capturing behavioral adaptation data, likely including environmental parameters like temperature, humidity, and light intensity."
    DTDFVocab:producedData GreenhouseBehavioralData
]

instance AirQualityCarbonDioxideSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi-integrated CO₂ sensor for real-time air quality monitoring in indoor environments, part of the Air Quality Management system."
    DTDFVocab:producedData AirQualityCarbonDioxideData
]

instance AirQualityParticulateMatterSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi-integrated particulate matter (PM2.5/PM10) sensor for real-time air quality monitoring in indoor environments, part of the Air Quality Management system."
    DTDFVocab:producedData AirQualityParticulateMatterData
]

instance AirQualityTemperatureHumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi-integrated temperature and humidity sensor for real-time air quality monitoring in indoor environments, part of the Air Quality Management system."
    DTDFVocab:producedData AirQualityTemperatureHumidityData
]

instance CranePositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Encoder system on the lab-scale gantry crane measuring joint angles and positions for real-time kinematic data acquisition."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CranePositionData
]

instance CraneMotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring motor currents in the lab-scale gantry crane for control feedback and power monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneMotorCurrentData
]

instance CraneLoadCell : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Load cell sensor measuring the weight and distribution of loads on the lab-scale gantry crane."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneLoadData
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance GreenhouseBehavioralData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GreenhouseEnvironmentalSensor
]

instance AirQualityCarbonDioxideData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AirQualityCarbonDioxideSensor
]

instance AirQualityParticulateMatterData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AirQualityParticulateMatterSensor
]

instance AirQualityTemperatureHumidityData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AirQualityTemperatureHumiditySensor
]

instance CranePositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CranePositionEncoder
]

instance CraneMotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneMotorCurrentSensor
]

instance CraneLoadData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneLoadCell
]

instance CraneExecutionTrajectoryData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CranePositionEncoder
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance GreenhouseBehavioralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Behavioral adaptation model of the greenhouse system using prerecorded data within virtual machine images for real-time simulation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo InfluxDBTimeSeriesStorage, ActiveMQMessageBroker
]

instance AutomationMLAirQualityModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "AutomationML-based digital twin model representing the air quality management system for simulation and prediction purposes."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AzureSimulationEngine, AzurePredictionService
]

instance CraneKinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model of the lab-scale gantry crane representing joint movements, load dynamics, and trajectory planning."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEngine
]

instance GreenhouseBehavioralDataInstance : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data capturing greenhouse environmental conditions and behavioral adaptation patterns."
    DTDFVocab:fromData GreenhouseBehavioralData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GreenhouseBehavioralModel
]

instance AirQualityMetricsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time air quality metrics including CO₂ levels, particulate matter concentrations, temperature, and humidity."
    DTDFVocab:fromData AirQualityCarbonDioxideData, AirQualityParticulateMatterData, AirQualityTemperatureHumidityData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AutomationMLAirQualityModel
]

instance CraneStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Continuous data stream capturing crane state metrics including position, velocity, acceleration, and motor feedback."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CranePositionData, CraneMotorCurrentData, CraneLoadData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CraneKinematicModel
]

instance CraneExecutionTrajectoryDataInstance : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Data representing planned vs. actual execution trajectories for crane movements and load handling."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneExecutionTrajectoryData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ContinuousValidationService
]

// C11: Enablers
instance InfluxDBTimeSeriesStorage : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "InfluxDB database for storing time-series data related to greenhouse environmental conditions and behavioral adaptation."
    DTDFVocab:enables GreenhouseMonitoringService, GreenhouseValidationService
]

instance ActiveMQMessageBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ActiveMQ message broker facilitating data synchronization between physical greenhouse and its digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables GreenhouseControlService, GreenhouseOptimizationService
]

instance AzureSimulationEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Microsoft Azure-hosted simulation engine for processing air quality data and running scenario analyses."
    DTDFVocab:enables AirQualityVisualizationService, AirQualityDecisionSupportService
]

instance AzurePredictionService : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Microsoft Azure prediction service enabling scenario analysis and virus spread modeling based on air quality data."
    DTDFVocab:enables AirQualityOptimizationService
]

instance TimescaleDBDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB database for storing historical operational data, sensor readings, and validation logs for the lab-scale gantry crane."
    DTDFVocab:enables CraneMonitoringService, CraneValidationService
]

instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker facilitating asynchronous signaling between logging application and database for crane data integration."
    DTDFVocab:enables CraneLoggingApplication
]

instance SimulationEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulation engine (e.g., MATLAB/Simulink) for developing kinematic models and dynamic simulations of the gantry crane."
    DTDFVocab:enables CraneOptimizationService, CraneControlService
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom validation framework comparing simulated trajectories with actual crane movements for continuous validation."
    DTDFVocab:enables CraneValidationService
]

instance ControlAlgorithmService : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Service implementing control algorithms for crane trajectory planning and adaptive control strategies."
    DTDFVocab:enables CraneControlService
]

instance CraneLoggingApplication : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Application for continuous logging of crane operations and data collection."
    DTDFVocab:enables CraneMonitoringService
]

// C6: Services
instance GreenhouseMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data logging of greenhouse operations for historical analysis and system health tracking."
    DTDFVocab:provides GreenhouseEnvironmentalInsight
]

instance GreenhouseValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation methods to ensure alignment between greenhouse digital twin and physical system."
    DTDFVocab:provides GreenhouseBehavioralValidationInsight
]

instance GreenhouseControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Bidirectional control services where the digital twin influences greenhouse operations via adaptive control strategies."
    DTDFVocab:provides GreenhouseAdaptiveControlAction
]

instance GreenhouseOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization services to improve greenhouse performance through energy-efficient behavioral adaptations."
    DTDFVocab:provides GreenhouseEnergyOptimizationInsight
]

instance AirQualityMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of air quality metrics (CO₂, PM2.5, temperature, humidity) for runtime analysis."
    DTDFVocab:provides AirQualityRealTimeInsight
]

instance AirQualityVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization of air quality data and scenario analysis results via Azure-hosted dashboards."
    DTDFVocab:provides AirQualityVisualizationInsight
]

instance AirQualityDecisionSupportService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Decision support service providing insights for runtime monitoring and scenario analysis."
    DTDFVocab:provides AirQualityDecisionSupportInsight
]

instance AirQualityOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization services for air quality management through predictive modeling and scenario analysis."
    DTDFVocab:provides AirQualityOptimizationInsight
]

instance CraneMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data logging of crane operations (position, speed, load, sensor readings) for historical analysis."
    DTDFVocab:provides CraneStateInsight
]

instance CraneValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation methods ensuring alignment between digital twin and physical crane, including fault detection."
    DTDFVocab:provides CraneValidationInsight
]

instance CraneOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimal control services to improve crane performance through trajectory planning and energy efficiency."
    DTDFVocab:provides CraneOptimizationInsight
]

instance CraneVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D/2D visualization of crane state, kinematics, and operational data using CAD models."
    DTDFVocab:provides CraneVisualizationInsight
]

instance CraneControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Bidirectional control services where the digital twin influences crane operations via adaptive control."
    DTDFVocab:provides CraneControlAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance GreenhouseEnvironmentalInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time environmental metrics (temperature, humidity, light) for greenhouse behavioral adaptation monitoring."
]

instance GreenhouseBehavioralValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation results comparing physical greenhouse behavior with digital twin simulations for consistency checks."
]

instance GreenhouseAdaptiveControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustments to greenhouse systems based on digital twin predictions for behavioral adaptation."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance GreenhouseEnergyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Energy consumption analysis and optimization recommendations for greenhouse operations."
]

instance AirQualityRealTimeInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time air quality metrics (CO₂, PM2.5, temperature, humidity) for immediate monitoring."
]

instance AirQualityVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive dashboards visualizing air quality data and scenario analysis results."
]

instance AirQualityDecisionSupportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Decision support insights for runtime monitoring and scenario analysis of air quality management."
]

instance AirQualityOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimization recommendations based on predictive modeling of air quality scenarios."
]

instance CraneStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical and real-time state data of the gantry crane including position, velocity, and load metrics."
]

instance CraneValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Continuous validation results comparing simulated and actual crane trajectories for fault detection."
]

instance CraneOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimization recommendations for crane trajectory planning and energy-efficient operations."
]

instance CraneVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D/2D visualizations of crane kinematics, state, and operational data for spatial awareness."
]

instance CraneControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic control adjustments to crane operations based on digital twin predictions."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C1: Environments/Components
instance GreenhouseEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Controlled indoor environment for plant cultivation with adaptive digital twin capabilities."
    base:contains GreenhouseEnvironmentalSensor, GreenhousePhysicalSystem
]

instance GreenhousePhysicalSystem : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical greenhouse infrastructure including climate control systems and cultivation equipment."
    base:isContainedIn GreenhouseEnvironment
]

instance AirQualityManagementSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Indoor air quality management system with Raspberry Pi sensor network and Azure-hosted digital twin."
    base:contains AirQualityCarbonDioxideSensor, AirQualityParticulateMatterSensor, AirQualityTemperatureHumiditySensor
]

instance LabScaleGantryCraneEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Lab-scale cyber-physical system environment for gantry crane experimentation and digital twin validation."
    base:contains CranePhysicalSystem, CraneController
]

instance CranePhysicalSystem : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane hardware including mechanical structure, motors, and load handling mechanisms."
    base:isContainedIn LabScaleGantryCraneEnvironment
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "
The **Virtual-to-Physical Interaction** in this system is mediated by the **Control Application**, which generates and executes commands for the **Physical Crane** via the **Physical Crane Interface**. Key aspects include:

- **Command Types**:
  - Movement trajectories (optimized via the **Trajectory Generator Service**) with kinematic constraints (e.g., zero-residual swinging at endpoints).
  - Control parameters (e.g., speed, acceleration profiles) derived from the simulation model.

- **Control Message Formats**:
  - Commands are likely serialized as structured data (e.g., JSON or protocol buffers) to ensure compatibility with the **Physical Crane Interface** (Python-based).

- **Validation and Authentication Mechanisms**:
  - No explicit authentication is mentioned, but the **Continuous Validation Service** validates executed trajectories against simulated predictions using distance metrics (e.g., Euclidean distance between planned vs. actual paths). Threshold breaches trigger alerts via the **Dashboard**.

- **Feedback Systems**:
  - Closed-loop feedback is implied through the **Continuous Validation Service**, which compares real-time measurements with simulated trajectories. Operators are notified via the **Dashboard** if deviations exceed thresholds.

- **Conflict Resolution**:
  - Not explicitly documented, but the **Control Application** likely prioritizes real-time trajectory execution over research simulations (e.g., via the **Simulation Service**), as the physical system operates independently of the Digital Twin when needed.

- **Command Execution Confirmation**:
  - No explicit confirmation mechanism is described, though the **Logging Application** records executed trajectories for post-hoc validation.
"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The **GreenhouseDT** exemplar employs an **ad-hoc orchestration** with **InfluxDB** for time-series data storage, **ActiveMQ** for message brokering, and **virtual machines** for deployment, utilizing **prerecorded data** to simulate physical behavior. The **Air Quality Management** exemplar integrates **AutomationML-based digital twin models** with **Microsoft Azure** for pipeline implementation, featuring **runtime visualization, simulation, and prediction** services. The **Lab Scale Gantry Crane** system (implied in the context diagram) lacks explicit constellation details but aligns with the **ad-hoc approach** described in the discussion, where **containerization/virtualization** (e.g., Docker/Kubernetes) is implied for modularity. No commercial digital twin framework is used; instead, **custom integration patterns** dominate, with **single-board computers (Raspberry-Pi)** acting as edge nodes for physical-digital synchronization."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The provided documents do not explicitly detail lifecycle phases for any of the Digital Twin systems (GreenhouseDT, Air Quality Management, or Lab Scale Gantry Crane). However, the **GreenhouseDT** exemplar implies a lifecycle involving:
  - **Development Stage**: Behavioral adaptation of both the physical greenhouse and its digital twin, utilizing pre-recorded data in virtual machine images for initial setup.
  - **Runtime Stage**: Continuous adaptation of the digital twin's behavior in response to real-time sensor data (InfluxDB) and message brokering (ActiveMQ).
  - **Transition Management**: Ad-hoc, as the exemplar lacks formalized governance frameworks but relies on containerization/virtualization for reproducibility.
  The **Air Quality Management** exemplar suggests lifecycle phases including:
  - **Design Stage**: Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) principles for digital twin construction, with AutomationML as the representation standard.
  - **Deployment Stage**: Raspberry Pi-based sensor integration for physical system monitoring.
  - **Runtime Stage**: Simulation, prediction, and visualization via Microsoft Azure tools (e.g., runtime analytics pipelines).
  The **Lab Scale Gantry Crane** system (mentioned in context) implies lifecycle phases via the C4 Model, though specifics (e.g., transition governance) are not detailed. No lifecycle governance frameworks (e.g., ISO/IEC 42010, IEEE 1471) are referenced in the documents."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The **GreenhouseDT** exemplar emphasizes **behavioral adaptation** of both the physical and digital systems, suggesting iterative validation through real-time feedback loops. However, explicit **fidelity requirements**, **verification methods**, or **uncertainty quantification** (e.g., error detection/correction mechanisms) are not described. The **Air Quality Management** exemplar focuses on **runtime visualization, simulation, and prediction**, implying model validation via **Azure-based pipelines**, but no technical details (e.g., validation metrics, uncertainty sources) are provided. The **Lab Scale Gantry Crane** exemplar does not address fidelity or validity considerations in the provided documents. Quality assurance processes are not mentioned for any exemplar."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "
The **Digital Twin Technical Connection** infrastructure relies on the following components and protocols:

- **Communication Protocols**:
  - **MQTT Broker**: Used for inter-service signaling (e.g., Logging Application → Database, Trajectory Generator → Control Application). MQTT ensures lightweight, publish-subscribe communication with QoS levels unspecified.
  - **Database Integration**: TimescaleDB (a PostgreSQL extension) stores time-series data, with no explicit protocol specified for direct database access (likely REST/HTTP or native PostgreSQL APIs).
  - **Physical Crane Interface**: Custom Python-based interface for low-level hardware communication (protocol unspecified but likely hardware-specific).

- **Network Topology and Architecture**:
  - No explicit topology described, but the **MQTT Broker** suggests a centralized messaging hub connecting all Digital Twin services (Dashboard, Trajectory Generator, Simulation Service, etc.). The **Physical Crane Interface** bridges the physical system to the Digital Twin via a dedicated connection.

- **Bandwidth and Latency Requirements**:
  - Not specified, but real-time trajectory validation (via **Continuous Validation Service**) implies low-latency requirements for MQTT and database operations. TimescaleDB’s time-series optimization suggests efficient querying for real-time data.

- **Reliability and Redundancy Mechanisms**:
  - No redundancy mechanisms are documented. The system relies on the **Continuous Validation Service** for fault detection (e.g., trajectory deviations) but lacks explicit failover or backup protocols.

- **Security Protocols**:
  - Not mentioned. Assumed to be minimal (e.g., default MQTT security or local network isolation), as no encryption, authentication, or access control measures are described.
"
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "
The **Digital Twin Hosting and Deployment** infrastructure is not explicitly detailed, but inferred from the described components:

- **Hosting Platform**:
  - **On-premise**: The system is tailored for a lab-scale gantry crane, implying local deployment (no cloud/edge deployment mentioned). The **MQTT Broker**, **TimescaleDB**, and Python services likely run on a single machine or a small cluster.

- **Computational and Storage Requirements**:
  - **Computational**: The **Trajectory Generator Service** and **Simulation Service** require computational resources for kinematic modeling and trajectory optimization (unspecified hardware specs). The **Continuous Validation Service** performs real-time distance metric calculations, implying moderate CPU requirements.
  - **Storage**: TimescaleDB stores time-series data for logging and validation. No capacity or retention policies are specified, but the system is designed for research purposes (likely small-scale data volumes).

- **Scalability Mechanisms**:
  - Not documented. The system is monolithic in scope (limited to a single gantry crane), with no mention of horizontal scaling (e.g., distributed MQTT brokers or sharded databases).

- **Deployment Models Supported**:
  - **Single-node deployment**: All services (Dashboard, Trajectory Generator, Simulation Service, etc.) are likely deployed as interconnected processes on a single machine. No containerization (e.g., Docker) or orchestration (e.g., Kubernetes) is mentioned.

- **Availability/Reliability Assurance**:
  - No redundancy or high-availability mechanisms are described. The system’s reliability depends on the **Continuous Validation Service** for anomaly detection but lacks proactive failover or backup strategies.
"
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The **GreenhouseDT** exemplar integrates with **InfluxDB** (time-series database) and **ActiveMQ** (message broker) for bidirectional data exchange, relying on **virtual machine prerecorded data** for offline synchronization. The **Air Quality Management** exemplar leverages **AutomationML** for model exchange, **Microsoft Azure** for cloud-based processing, and **Raspberry-Pi sensors** for real-time physical data ingestion, with no explicit mention of enterprise system dependencies. The **Lab Scale Gantry Crane** system (contextualized in the discussion) is implied to use **C4 Model architecture** for software-hardware integration but lacks details on interoperability standards (e.g., OPC UA, MQTT) or enterprise system dependencies. No explicit horizontal integration patterns (e.g., federated twins, microservices) are documented."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "
The **GreenhouseDT** exemplar employs an **ad-hoc security approach** with no explicit mention of formal cybersecurity protocols, access control mechanisms, or authentication systems in the provided documentation. However, it relies on **InfluxDB** (a time-series database) and **ActiveMQ** (a message broker) for data exchange, which may introduce potential vulnerabilities if not properly secured (e.g., unencrypted data transmission, default credentials, or lack of role-based access control). The system’s **virtual machine (VM) deployment** suggests a controlled environment, but no details are provided regarding **fail-safe mechanisms**, **risk assessments**, or **safety-critical considerations** for the greenhouse’s operational integrity.

The **Air Quality Management** exemplar utilizes **Raspberry Pi sensors** for real-time data collection, which may expose the system to **physical tampering** or **sensor spoofing** if not physically secured. The **AutomationML-based digital twin** and **Microsoft Azure pipeline** imply cloud-based processing, but no explicit **data encryption**, **access control policies**, or **privacy compliance** (e.g., GDPR, CCPA) are documented. The exemplar lacks mention of **consent management**, **data anonymization**, or **data sharing agreements**, leaving governance ambiguities. While **runtime visualization** and **prediction** features are highlighted, no safety-critical failover mechanisms or threat mitigation strategies (e.g., DDoS protection, intrusion detection) are referenced.

The **Lab Scale Gantry Crane** system is described using the **C4 Model**, but no technical details on **security and safety** are provided in the context diagram or accompanying text. No mention of **cyber-physical security** (e.g., secure communication protocols for crane control), **authentication systems** (e.g., OAuth, API keys), or **fail-safe mechanisms** (e.g., emergency stop overrides, redundant controllers) is included. The system’s **cyber-physical integration** (e.g., puck movement automation) introduces potential risks such as **unauthorized control commands** or **data integrity violations**, but these are not addressed in the documentation."
]
